title: How Jieba Splits Chinese
description: An NLP newcomer asks how Chinese tokenization actually works. Walk through jieba's three-layer design.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Why do Chinese NLP pipelines need a tokenizer at all? There are no spaces?

templates.text: Exactly because there are no spaces. The model needs word boundaries first.
templates.hint_zh: 正因為沒空格,模型需要先有詞界。

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: And jieba is the standard tool?

templates.text: It's the most widely used open-source one. Three layers, well documented.
templates.hint_zh: 最廣泛使用的開源工具。三層設計,文件齊全。

templates.text: First, build a DAG from a prefix dictionary. Second, dynamic programming for the best path.
templates.hint_zh: 第一,從前綴詞典建 DAG。第二,用動態規劃找最佳路徑。

templates.text: HMM with Viterbi for words not in the dictionary. New names, slang, proper nouns.
templates.hint_zh: 用 HMM 加 Viterbi 處理詞典裡沒有的詞,像新名字、俚語、專有名詞。

templates.text: Surprisingly fast. Parallel mode gives roughly three times the throughput on multi-core.
templates.hint_zh: 意外地快。並行模式在多核上吞吐量大約是三倍。

templates.text: Domain words. You'll need a custom dictionary for medical, legal, or product terms.
templates.hint_zh: 領域詞彙。醫療、法律、產品名都要自訂詞典。
